name: Exim Remote Command Execution Detected
description: Detects remote command execution attempts in Exim by identifying the CVE-2019-10149 vulnerability.

prompts.prompt: Remote Command Execution (RCE) attempt detected targeting Exim via CVE-2019-10149. A suspicious pattern in the receiver address indicates an exploitation attempt. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **Sender** {sender}, **Receiver** {receiver}, **Message ID** {message_id}, **Subject** {subject}. Investigate this high-risk vulnerability exploitation attempt immediately.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the Exim log event.

parameters.name: receiver
parameters.description: The receiver's email address, containing the exploit pattern.

parameters.name: message_id
parameters.description: The Exim message ID for the email.
